first:
```yaml
phases:
  - id: 1
    name: missing_prompt
    success_criteria:
      output_file: ~/Documents/projects/reports/x.md
```
second:
```yaml
defaults:
  max_retries: 2
chain_config:
  alert_channels: [handoff]
  max_concurrent: 1
phases:
  - id: 1
    name: fixed_phase
    description: 'Now has a prompt_template.'
    deps: []
    max_minutes: 90
    success_criteria:
      output_file: '~/Documents/projects/reports/fixed_p1_2026-05-16.md'
      min_bytes: 800
      requires_merged_pr: true
    prompt_template: |
      Phase 1 — fixed. This is a long-enough prompt template to satisfy the
      schema validator's 40-character minimum, with concrete file paths under
      caia/packages/... and a PR / Report section.
```
